rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0010
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—You came.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0020
rows.name:
There is no longer any
meaning to this struggle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0030
rows.name:
And yet you still try
to resist me to the very end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0040
rows.name: You[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0050
rows.name: displease me to no end.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0060
rows.name: You will give Al back to us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0070
rows.name: Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0080
rows.name: Soon, I will complete my escape[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0090
rows.name: and achieve victory.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0100
rows.name: The time you have left is already scarce.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0110
rows.name:
Know that all your
resistance is meaningless[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0115
rows.name: Elma-san, the core is[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0125
rows.name: Yes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0130
rows.name:
Little by little, it's
entering an active state.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0140
rows.name: If the core is the source of Void's power,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0150
rows.name: then when all the cores are activated,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0160
rows.name:
he intends to use that power
to escape this universe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0170
rows.name: Before that happens, we'll rescue the Ares[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0180
rows.name: Rescue Al.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0190
rows.name:
It's our only way to break
through this situation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0195
rows.name: Are you ready?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0196
rows.name: Understood![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0203
rows.name: The protagonist nods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0201
rows.name: Elma turns back to face Void.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33800100_MSG0200
rows.name: Let's go![ST:wait ]
